ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, trainer, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the device */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Last synchronization date with the server */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the device's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "calories_burned_factor" REAL /* Factor used to calculate calories burned for the activity type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_rate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device collecting the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the day when the data was collected */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second of the day when the data was collected */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate value */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type during which the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual input, device) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_rate_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_rate_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spo2_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device collecting the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the day when the data was collected */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second of the day when the data was collected */,
  "spo2" INTEGER /* SpO2 value */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type during which the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual input, device) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spo2_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spo2_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device with the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_settings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of the goal (e.g., distance, calories burned) */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "progress_value" INTEGER /* Value of the progress update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES user_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer receiving the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of the feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the comment */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer providing the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., motivational, instructional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_comments_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
